title: 荣誉附件正文｜T2EP20122 0035 Letter of Award
content: MOE-T2EP20122-0010 27 December 2022 Singapore University of Technology and Design Dear Zhang Shuhao, LETTER OF AWARD: MOE ACADEMIC RESEARCH FUND TIER 2 (STEM RIE2025) 1. Grant Approval We are pleased to convey grant approval for the following: MOE Academic Research Fund Tier 2 (STEM RIE2025) Proposal ID T2EP20122-0035 Title of research project IntelliStream: Towards Highly-Optimized, Ultra-Scalable, and Self-Adaptive Data Stream Analytics in the Heterogeneous IoT Environment Lead PI Zhang Shuhao Approved Grant Duration 36 month(s) PI Name Zhang Shuhao Institution Singapore University of Technology and Design Direct Cost (S$): 500,430.00 Approved grant amount Indirect Cost (S$): 19,629.00 Total Cost (S$): 520,059.00 2. Compulsory Documents to be Submitted. 2.1. If you, the above named Institution, accept this grant and the terms and conditions applicable thereto, please complete, sign and mail the following documents to no later than 04 January 2023. (i) Letter of Acceptance: It must be signed by a duly authorised officer representing the Institution, the Lead Principal Investigator (PI) and all Team PIs in their personal capacity as Investigators agreeing to accept and be bound by the terms and conditions of the grant. Where practicable, all signatures should appear on a single Acceptance Form. (ii) "MOE Academic Research Fund Tier 2 (STEM RIE2025) Budget Breakdown by Financial Year” (Annex E), over the approved period of funding; and 2.2. If we do not receive the above documents within the stipulated timeframe, we will assume that you do not wish to accept this Award. 2.3. If you require any further clarifications on this matter, please contact Loh Yi Hui, Email: LOH Yi Hui@moe.gov.sg Yours Sincerely, Ministry Of Education CC:
